description: Legal document. In Hebrew. Location: Rashīd (Rosetta). Dated: Thursday, 13 Heshvan 5311 AM, which is October 1550 CE. Witnesses: Seʿadya b. Yehuda קוננטיני and Yosef b. Shelomo חימזו. This document is a testimony certifying the validity of a bill of divorce and issued at the same time. Husband: Shammas b. ʿAbd al-Karīm known as Muṣallī. Wife: Sitt al-Bayt bt. Yaʿaqov. The husband has appointed Yiṣḥaq b. שעדקי as his agent to deliver the bill of divorce to his wife in Cairo.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
